name: HWR_VLTR_PER_PROFILE_TL
description: The translation table for the volunteer translation table

columns.Name: VOLUNTEER_ID
columns.Comments: VOLUNTEER_ID

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the first name of the person.

columns.Name: MIDDLE_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the middle name of the person.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the last name of the person.

columns.Name: ALIAS
columns.Comments: This is an identifier by which a person is known as.

columns.Name: GENDER_CODE
columns.Comments: A string code for gender: MALE, FEMALE or NA (not available).

columns.Name: EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email address of the person.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the profile.

columns.Name: INTERESTS
columns.Comments: The list of interests for the profile.

columns.Name: LANGUAGES
columns.Comments: The list of languages for the profile.

columns.Name: SKILLS
columns.Comments: The list of skills for the profile.

columns.Name: SPECIALTIES
columns.Comments: The list of specialties for the profile.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: TITLE

columns.Name: PROJECT_LEAD_INTEREST
columns.Comments: PROJECT_LEAD_INTEREST

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
